command: fabio warehouse query --workspace $WS --id $WAREHOUSE_ID --sql "SELECT TOP 10 * FROM dbo.orders"
description: Execute T-SQL against a Fabric warehouse. Supports inline SQL (--sql), file input (--sql @file.sql), or stdin piping.
notes: Connection string resolved automatically from item properties. Date columns may return as 'N days since 0001-01-01' format via TDS. Use three-part naming for cross-database queries within the same workspace: [OtherDB].[dbo].[table].
